description: Copies a 3D vector to a new starting point, preserving direction and length
utility: Reposition a vector to start at a specified point while maintaining its properties

arguments.name: vector
arguments.description: The vector to copy and reposition

arguments.name: new_start_point
arguments.description: The point where the vector should start

alternates.description: Specify the new start point using x, y, z coordinates instead of point3d

examples.scenario: place vector at a new point
